mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO youtube_comment_analysis_sentiment_items ( history_id, user_id, comment_id, published_at, text_clean, lex_label, lex_score, matched, llm_label, final_label, corrected, corrected_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{historyId}, #{userId}, #{it.commentId}, #{it.publishedAt}, #{it.textClean}, #{it.lexLabel}, #{it.lexScore}, #{it.matched}, NULL, NULL, 0, NULL, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE youtube_comment_analysis_sentiment_items SET llm_label = #{llmLabel}, final_label = #{finalLabel}, corrected = #{corrected}, corrected_reason = #{correctedReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE history_id = #{historyId} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT published_at AS publishedAt, lex_label AS lexLabel, llm_label AS llmLabel, final_label AS finalLabel, lex_score AS lexScore, matched AS matched FROM youtube_comment_analysis_sentiment_items WHERE history_id = #{historyId} AND (#{userId} IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY id ASC
